summary: Removed the Card Alerts accordion block (the last <details> element rendering AlertsTab) from HealthRecordsSection. Also removed the AlertsTab import and the alerts/setAlerts destructuring from the context, as those identifiers were exclusively used by the removed block. The remaining four accordions — Conditions, Allergies, Medications, Vaccinations — are untouched. AlertsTab component file is preserved.
notes_for_reviewer: TypeScript check shows one pre-existing error in OverviewSection.tsx (conditions prop mismatch) and one in DocumentImportSection.tsx — both exist on the baseline working tree before this task's edits. Zero new errors introduced.
